name: legal-ops-clm
description: Corporate legal-operations & contract-lifecycle-management (CLM) team — 3 agents (legal-ops-lead, contract-review-specialist, obligations-and-renewals-analyst) for the operational layer of an in-house legal/legal-ops function: legal intake & triage and the request workflow, contract playbooks & matter management, clause libraries & redline review with fallback/standard positions and key-term extraction, and obligation/renewal/auto-renew tracking with a contract repository, metadata model, reporting & alerts. This is operational/process support, NOT legal advice — a lawyer signs off on legal judgement. Decision-tree knowledge bank (5 Mermaid trees + dated CLM map), 12 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, 5 scenarios, a stdlib renewal-window/cycle-time/obligation-aging calc. Seams: a law firm's own business -> legal-small-firm; supplier contracts -> procurement-sourcing; DPA/privacy clauses -> data-governance-privacy. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
